coach.title: AI Coach
coach.welcome: Hi! I'm your AI Coach. I'm here to help you progress, motivate you and answer all your fitness questions. What would you like to know?
coach.axisInstruction: Click on an axis to see recommended programs:
coach.saveTip: Save the plans generated by the Coach by clicking on the bookmark!
coach.noPlanSaved: No plan saved for this axis
coach.noPlanSavedTip: In the "Chat room", click "Save" at the end of a Coach message!
coach.aiAccessible: The plans are accessible by the AI for your challenges and duels.
coach.launchScenario: Launch a predefined scenario so the Coach prepares your briefing:
coach.performanceTip: Train regularly. Accumulating XP helps you climb the rankings.
coach.chatBubbleTooltip: Can be saved under AI Help Axes
coach.chatInputPlaceholder: Request a personalized plan, a squat technique, or detox tips...
coach.introP1: Hi {name}! I'm Coach Alexandre, your Professional Sports Advisor on Fitness Duel. I'm here to support your progress and help you beat Thomas, Camille and the others!
coach.introP2: Ask me a question about push-ups, squats, cardio, recovery or earning XP in the app.
coach.coachIntroClicked: Your sports advisor is here to help you progress!
coach.axesForceShort: Muscle building, postural strengthening and raw strength.
coach.axesCardioShort: Improved breath, calorie burning and endurance.
coach.axesRecupShort: Stretching, restorative breathing and joint flexibility.
coach.programForce1Desc: Complete routine for chest, back and legs.
coach.programForce1Prompt: Give me a detailed 3-day bodyweight strength training plan.
coach.programForce2Desc: Joint alignment and core belt activation.
coach.programForce2Prompt: What are the markers for a perfect plank?
coach.programForce3Desc: Mechanical tension time to stimulate growth.
coach.programForce3Prompt: Explain tempo execution in bodyweight strength training.
coach.programForce4Desc: Plyometrics for vertical leap and explosiveness.
coach.programForce4Prompt: Give me a plyometric routine for legs.
coach.programCardio1Desc: No-equipment HIIT circuit, ideal for mornings.
coach.programCardio1Prompt: Give me a 15-minute no-equipment HIIT circuit.
coach.programCardio2Prompt: Create a running plan to go from 5 km to 10 km.
coach.programCardio3Prompt: Suggest a 20-min cardio circuit with no jumps.
coach.programRecup1Prompt: Give me a mobility routine for hips and lower back.
coach.programRecup2Desc: Promotes blood flow and relieves soreness.
coach.programRecup3Desc: Heart rate coherence to reduce stress.
coach.programRecup3Prompt: Explain the heart rate coherence exercise.
coach.programRecup4Desc: Morning body wake-up to start strong.
coach.programRecup4Prompt: Give me a 5-minute joint wake-up sequence.
coach.programNutrition1Desc: How much protein relative to your body mass?
coach.programNutrition1Prompt: Explain how to calculate your protein needs.
coach.programNutrition2Desc: Psychological hacks to overcome lack of motivation.
coach.programNutrition2Prompt: Give me mental tips for training.
coach.programNutrition3Prompt: How to optimize hydration before and after exercise?
coach.programNutrition4Desc: Restorative night rituals and growth hormone.
coach.programNutrition4Prompt: What are the best habits for quality sleep?
coach.seedPlan1Content:
1. 3 sets of 10 push-ups (3-1-1)
2. 2 sets of 8 diamond push-ups
3. 3 sets of 12 chair dips.
coach.seedPlan2Content: 250g cottage cheese + wild berries + 30g pumpkin seeds + 1 tbsp honey.

home.title: Dashboard
home.heroSlide0: Launch custom challenges with push-ups, squats or planks to test your limits, and invite your friends to compete!
home.heroSlide1: Motivate your community by following their achievements, commenting on their workouts and chatting live with the AI Coach.
home.heroSlide2: Accumulate XP with every validated sports session, climb the rankings and unlock dazzling Sports Badges!
home.ctaHeadline: Create a challenge and motivate your friends!
home.ctaSubtitle: Nothing beats a little competition to push yourself.
home.expandRankings: The rankings are expanding with {count} new users!
home.inviteDescFull: Share your invitation link and both of you earn 100 XP!

landing.heroHeadline: Challenge your friends. Progress. Climb the leaderboard.
landing.heroSubtitle: The ultimate social fitness app that turns every workout into a duel. Create challenges, log your sessions, climb to the top.
landing.featureChallengesDesc: Create custom push-up, squat, planking, or running challenges. Challenge your friends and motivate each other.
landing.featureXpDesc: Every completed workout earns you XP. Level up, unlock badges, and become a legend.
landing.featureCoachDesc: Coach Alexandre gives personalized advice and creates training plans tailored to your goals.
landing.featureRankingsDesc: Compare your performance with the community. Weekly, monthly or all-time: you choose.
landing.step1Desc: Choose an exercise, invite a friend and launch the duel.
landing.step2Desc: Log your session and complete your workout to earn XP.
landing.step3Desc: Accumulate XP, unlock badges and become the legend.
landing.coachFeature2: Technical advice to improve your form
landing.faqFreeA: Yes, Fitness Duel is completely free. All features are accessible without payment.
landing.faqStartA: Sign up in 30 seconds, set up your profile and launch your first challenge in under 2 minutes.
landing.faqOfflineQ: Does the AI Coach work offline?
landing.faqOfflineA: Yes! The AI Coach works entirely offline thanks to a keyword recognition system.
landing.faqDataA: Your data is stored locally on your device. No personal data is shared with third parties.
landing.faqFriendsQ: Can I challenge a specific friend?
landing.faqFriendsA: Absolutely. You can challenge any friend on your list or invite new friends with your referral link.
landing.faqXpQ: How do I earn XP quickly?
landing.faqXpA: Log your sessions, complete challenges, chat with the AI Coach and add active friends.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join the Fitness Duel community and turn your routine into friendly competition.

onboarding.configureSubtitle: Tell us who you are to personalize your experience.
onboarding.step1Subtitle: Tell us who you are to personalize your experience.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: Challenge your loved ones to stay motivated. The more active friends you have, the more fun the competition!
onboarding.addFriendSection: Or add a friend by username
onboarding.step3Subtitle: Choose a starter challenge or jump right in. You can create more from the dashboard.
